title: features.json — Feature & Service Matrix
description: Per-competitor capability matrix (PRD §Feature & Service Coverage). ONE matrix per competitor holds BOTH product features and human/professional services, distinguished by the `category` tag (feature | service). Cells are drawn from a FIXED canonical taxonomy of capability keys (see references/data-schema.md §features) so every competitor is scored against the same axes and the report can render a true side-by-side grid. Each cell is a confidence-wrapped field whose `status` enum (has | partial | none) captures the support level. Joined by `entity_ref`.

capabilityKey.title: Capability Key
capabilityKey.description: A capability axis key (a feature or service). The taxonomy is CONFIGURABLE data, not a fixed enum: it lives in capability_taxonomy.json (override with --taxonomy / $COMPETE_TAXONOMY), so the schema validates the key's SHAPE (snake_case) and lets the taxonomy file own the closed set. The sibling `category` field tags whether a key is a feature or a service; collect_intelligence.py derives that category from the taxonomy, so cells are category-consistent by construction.

capabilityStatus.title: Capability Status
capabilityStatus.description: Support level for a capability. `has` = fully supported, `partial` = limited/beta/add-on, `none` = confidently absent, `null` = not determined (only when unknown:true).

matrixEntry.title: Matrix Entry (confidence-wrapped capability cell)
matrixEntry.description: One capability cell. It IS a confidence-wrapped field (extends common.baseField: value/confidence/unknown/source?/provenance?/notes?) plus the `key`, `category`, and `status` discriminators. `value` is the tri-state boolean 'is this capability supported at all' (true ⇔ status has|partial; false ⇔ status none; null ⇔ unknown). The unknown invariant is enforced below.

category.description: Discriminates a product feature from a human/professional service.

value.description: Tri-state boolean: supported (has|partial) = true, confidently absent (none) = false, not determined = null.

matrix.description: The capability matrix: an array of cells spanning the active feature + service taxonomy (capability_taxonomy.json). A key omitted from the array is equivalent to an all-unknown cell (a missing record == all fields unknown).
